$comment: the harness MCP connections (Claude Code project scope). Docs per server: agent/mcp/. Env vars are expanded from your shell / .env. Enable ONLY what an agent needs — every connected server's tool schemas consume context tokens on every turn (see skills/token-optimization).

graphiti.$comment: Temporal knowledge-graph project memory (getzep/graphiti MCP server + FalkorDB). Setup: agent/mcp/graphiti.md

github.$comment: Official GitHub remote MCP (PRs, issues, branches). OAuth on first use. Docs: agent/mcp/github.md

atlassian.$comment: Official Atlassian remote MCP — Jira + Confluence (OAuth). Docs: agent/mcp/jira.md

figma.$comment: Figma Dev Mode MCP served locally by the Figma desktop app (Preferences > Enable Dev Mode MCP Server). Remote alternative: https://mcp.figma.com/mcp. Docs: agent/mcp/figma.md

database.$comment: Universal DB MCP (Postgres/MySQL/MariaDB/SQL Server/SQLite) via DBHub. READ-ONLY by default — never point agents at prod read-write. Docs: agent/mcp/database.md

slack.$comment: Community Slack MCP (the original reference server was archived). Verify the package & scopes before use. Docs: agent/mcp/slack.md

playwright.$comment: Browser automation for the QA agent (E2E checks against the running app).

context7.$comment: Up-to-date library docs lookup — reduces hallucinated APIs in unfamiliar frameworks. Optional.
